ResearchProjectDef.label: FEV-1
ResearchProjectDef.description: Catalog the first stable Forced Evolutionary Virus handling process. In play this is meant to follow analysis of an FEV probe; in this scaffold the item dependency is documented but not mechanically enforced.

ResearchProjectDef.label: FEV-2
ResearchProjectDef.description: Refine the first-generation process into reliable sample handling and cleaner dosage production. Intended to follow analysis of an FEV sample.

ResearchProjectDef.label: FEV-3
ResearchProjectDef.description: Stabilize isolated Forced Evolutionary Virus cultures for controlled colonist-facing procedures. Intended to follow analysis of an FEV culture.
